Alternatives

Looking for an MxToolbox alternative?

MxToolbox is one of the longest-running DNS lookup tools on the web. DNSSnuff takes a different approach: fewer manual lookups, more automated checks, and results that tell you what to do — not just what's there.

Feature comparison

Feature DNSSnuff MxToolbox
Checks per report72 automatedManual, per-lookup
Email authentication checks14 (SPF, DKIM, DMARC, BIMI)Separate tools per record
Plain-English verdicts✓ Every failed check✗ Raw data with status codes
Health score & letter grade✓✗
"Fix This First" priority✓✗
Shareable report URL✓Limited
DNSSEC verification✓ Full chain of trustBasic
Blacklist checks✓ 50+ RBLs✓ Extensive
Monitoring & alerts✓ Pro ($19/month)✓ Paid plans
White-label reports✓ Agency ($49/month)✗
API access✓ Agency✓ Paid
Free tier✓ Full 72-check report✓ Individual lookups

MxToolbox is a lookup tool.
DNSSnuff is a diagnostic tool.

MxToolbox is built around individual lookups — you choose which record to check, it shows you the raw result. It's powerful if you know exactly what you're looking for and can interpret the output.

DNSSnuff runs all 72 checks automatically and tells you what the results mean. One report covers everything — you don't need to check SPF, DMARC, MX records, and DNSSEC separately.

When MxToolbox makes sense:

  • You need to check a specific record type quickly
  • You're comfortable reading raw DNS data
  • You need extensive blacklist lookup capabilities specifically

When DNSSnuff makes sense:

  • You want a complete diagnostic in one report
  • You need plain-English explanations of what's wrong and how to fix it
  • You're managing multiple domains and want monitoring with change alerts
  • You're an MSP who needs white-label reports for clients

See what 72 automated checks find on your domain.

Free. No account required. Results in under 5 seconds.

Run a Free DNSSnuff Report →
◆ DNSSnuff

72 automated diagnostic checks across DNS health, email authentication, DNSSEC, and blacklists — in plain English. Free reports, always. Pro from $19/month. Agency from $49/month.
